title: Research: Incorporate Paperclip / Builderz Mission Control / OpenAI Symphony learnings into Autonomy v1 + Phase 2

# Research: Incorporate Paperclip / Builderz Mission Control / OpenAI Symphony learnings into Autonomy v1 + Phase 2

## Objective
Incorporar aprendizados relevantes dos repos:
- https://github.com/paperclipai/paperclip
- https://github.com/builderz-labs/mission-control
- https://github.com/openai/symphony

no nosso sistema atual (Mission Control + heartbeat-v3 + Autonomy v1 + Phase 2A/2B/2C), sem over-engineering.

## Context
- Nosso gargalo atual é dispatch/queue/dedup/linked s
